Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets Active Directory File System
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: General Access Method Custom Command and Control Protocol Data Encrypted

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attacker exploits exposed remote services to gain initial access.

stage.name: Execution
stage.technique_name: T1094: Custom Command and Control Protocol
stage.description: The attacker uses custom command and control protocol to execute malicious commands.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker encrypts data on the file system to cause disruption.

Scenario.summary: This scenario involves a basic-level attacker exploiting exposed remote services to gain initial access, executing malicious commands using custom protocols, and causing impact through data encryption.
